description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a dark wood frame that curves upward to form a prominent headboard. The bed sits on four slender metallic legs, giving it a floating appearance and providing clearance beneath. The mattress is thick and covered with a smooth, light gray sheet, accompanied by two rectangular pillows and a single accent pillow. The headboard is wide and slightly reclined, offering comfortable back support for sitting up. The overall construction suggests a sturdy yet elegant piece, suitable for contemporary urban interiors. The materials and finish evoke a sense of sophistication and comfort.
description: A modern platform bed with a curved dark wood frame, metallic legs, and a light gray sheeted mattress with pillows. The design is sleek and minimalist, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved headboard and the slim metallic legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upward curve of the headboard and the full length of the mattress.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the mattress, pillows, and the rectangular shape of the bed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headboard's curve and the arrangement of pillows.
